description_for_human: Order ServiceNow catalog items, browse the catalog, and manage your open requests from Microsoft 365 Copilot.
description_for_model: Action that wraps the ServiceNow MCP server (https://github.com/pavecer/mcp-server-servicenow). The MCP server exposes seven tools — search_catalog_items, get_catalog_item_form, place_order, list_user_orders, get_order_detail, update_order, validate_servicenow_config — and four MCP App (SEP-1865) widgets for browsing the catalog, filling the order form, listing open orders, and inspecting a single order.
